title: Episode verdict record (Decisions 0003 + 0004)
description: Statuses keyed by SEMANTIC ID from docs/verdict-registry.yaml (display aliases are prose-only). Four-valued statuses; ReqPath is governance-derived; every excluded verdict carries a reason; pathway aggregation is conjunction over ReqPath. R4 OBJECTIVITY-INDEXING REPAIR (B3): pathway adequacy is objective GIVEN a full index, so the index block is required — analysis, analysis version, evaluating actor, decision time and information state. R4 CLAIM-RELATIVE REASONING (B2): claim_reasoning_paths records per-claim reasoning adequacy over that claim's ReqReason projection, distinctly from the episode-level pathway_state; the two are NOT interchangeable and collapsing one into the other is rejected by the cross-record layer.

index.description: the full index relative to which this verdict is objective. Dropping any component makes 'objective' an overstatement (R4 finding B3).

actor.description: the evaluating actor whose EX_ANTE_JUSTIFIED index this is

decision_time.description: the decision time the ex-ante judgement is indexed to

information_state.description: the information state available at decision_time

required_path.description: ReqPath(e) = CorePath intersect RequiredBy(A, shape, risk, claims, governance)

na_reasons.description: REQUIRED for EVERY not-applicable status anywhere in the record, not only on the required path ('not tested' is never 'not applicable'). Enforced by the cross-record layer, which JSON Schema cannot express over dynamic keys.

claim_verdicts.description: claim-wise result-side records; TOKEN_TRUTH_LINKED pass entails RESULT_CORRECT pass per claim

then.description: factivity: TOKEN_TRUTH_LINKED pass entails RESULT_CORRECT pass

claim_reasoning_paths.description: claim-relative reasoning paths (B2). ReqReason_q(e) is the projection of ReqPath onto the verdicts that bear on claim q; reasoning_path_adequate is the conjunction over THAT projection only. A downstream routing or closure failure must not flip a soundly reached claim.

per_token_v3c.description: per-token GOV_TOKEN_ADEQUATE statuses preserved alongside the conjunction

rel_spec.description: RelSpec per claim for PROCEDURE_RELIABLE. Typed extension map: keys are claim ids, values are full reliability specifications. R4: a free-form string no longer stands in for a RelSpec.

perturb_spec.description: PerturbSpec per claim for ROBUST_NEIGHBORHOOD. Typed extension map: keys are claim ids, values are full perturbation specifications. R4: a free-form string no longer stands in for a PerturbSpec.
